basic_details.job_title: ESIC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Specialists and Senior Residents Posts
basic_details.post_name: Full Time Specialists and Senior Residents
basic_details.short_information: Employees’ State Insurance Corporation Hospital, Kakinada (ESIC) Full Time Specialists and Senior Residents Notification 2026 has been released under Advt No. 04/2026 on the official website ESIC. A total of 9 vacancies have been announced through the ESIC Full Time Specialists and Senior Residents Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 69 years for Full Time Specialists and up to 45 years for Senior Residents who have MBBS, Postgraduate Degree/Diploma in concerned specialty from a recognized university along with Medical Council registration are eligible to apply for these Full Time Specialists a

age_limit.age_details: Max 69 years for Full Time Specialists, Max 45 years for Senior Residents
age_limit.details: Full Time Specialists: Not exceeding 69 years. Senior Residents: Not exceeding 45 years. Age relaxation as per Central Government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS, Postgraduate Degree / Diploma in concerned specialty from recognized university
qualification.details: Full Time Specialist (Biochemistry): MBBS + Postgraduate Degree / Diploma in Biochemistry from recognized university. Registered with MCI/NMC/State Medical Council. 3 years experience after PG Degree OR 5 years after PG Diploma. Full Time Specialist (Microbiology): MBBS + Postgraduate Degree / Diploma in Microbiology from recognized university. Registered with MCI/NMC/State Medical Council. 3 years experience after PG Degree OR 5 years after PG Diploma. Full Time Specialist (Radiology): MBBS + Postgraduate Degree / Diploma in Radiology from recognized university. Registered with MCI/NMC/State Medical Council. 3 years experience after PG Degree OR 5 years after PG Diploma. Senior Resident (General Medicine): Postgraduate Degree or Diploma in General Medicine from recognized university. At least 2 years working experience after completing MBBS in concerned specialty/discipline. Senior Resident (Radiology): Postgraduate Degree or Diploma in Radiology from recognized university. At least 2 years working experience after completing MBBS in concerned specialty/discipline. Senior Resident (ICU - General Medicine): Postgraduate Degree or Diploma in General Medicine from recognized university. At least 2 years working experience after completing MBBS in concerned specialty/discipline. Senior Resident (ICU - Anaesthesia): Postgraduate Degree or Diploma in Anaesthesia from recognized university. At least 2 years working experience after completing MBBS in concerned specialty/discipline. Senior Resident (Chest): Postgraduate Degree or Diploma in Chest from recognized university. At least 2 years working experience after completing MBBS in concerned specialty/discipline.

selection_process: Submission of application + documents Document verification Scrutiny by committee Screening Test (if large number of candidates) Personal Interview Final merit list based on interview performance
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.esic.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ESIC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the hard copy of the application along with required documents is 20th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Full Time Specialist and Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for both Full Time Specialist and Senior Resident positions will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 1,28,630/- per month.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available in ESIC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 9 vacancies announced for the posts of Full Time Specialists and Senior Residents at ESIC Hospital, Kakinada.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for Full Time Specialists is 69 years, and for Senior Residents, it is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per Central Government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the mode of application for ESIC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for ESIC Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and send it via post.

faq.question: Q6. What are the essential qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree along with a Postgraduate Degree/Diploma in the concerned specialty and valid registration with the Medical Council of India/NMC/State Medical Council.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for SC/ST and Women candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for SC/ST and Women candidates. However, General and OBC candidates are required to pay Rs. 500/-.

faq.question: Q8. When is the Walk-in-Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in-Interview for the ESIC Recruitment 2026 is scheduled for 25th May 2026. A second walk-in for unfilled posts will be held on 05th June 2026.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents, including photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant educational and experience certificates.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of ESIC, which is www.esic.gov.in.
